name: Process Injection Sim — Ptrace Probe, /proc/mem Write Stub, Shared Library Drop

injection_probe.command: mkdir -p /tmp/ClawdianShield && ps aux 2>/dev/null | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2, $11}' | head -15 > /tmp/ClawdianShield/process_targets.txt || ls /proc | grep '^[0-9]' | head -15 > /tmp/ClawdianShield/process_targets.txt

TARGET_PID=$(ls /proc | grep '^[0-9]' | head -1) && cat /proc/$TARGET_PID/maps 2>/dev/null | head -20 > /tmp/ClawdianShield/proc_maps.txt || echo 'maps read failed' > /tmp/ClawdianShield/proc_maps.txt

TARGET_PID=$(ls /proc | grep '^[0-9]' | head -1) && ls -la /proc/$TARGET_PID/mem 2>/dev/null > /tmp/ClawdianShield/proc_mem_access.txt || echo 'mem access info unavailable' > /tmp/ClawdianShield/proc_mem_access.txt

echo '#!/bin/bash
echo ptrace injection stub - no actual injection performed
echo target_pid=$$
echo wrote_shellcode=false' > /tmp/ClawdianShield/ptrace_stub.sh && chmod +x /tmp/ClawdianShield/ptrace_stub.sh

so_hijack_prep.command: find /usr/lib /lib /usr/local/lib 2>/dev/null -writable -type f | head -10 > /tmp/ClawdianShield/writable_libs.txt || echo 'no writable libs (expected)' > /tmp/ClawdianShield/writable_libs.txt
